name: operator-kit
description: Agent Operator Kit for Codex: project-local operator workflows, feature sessions, task packets, lanes, memory, feedback intake, planning, design review, UX audit, journeys, and incubation.

interface.longDescription: Install Agent Operator Kit skills globally in Codex while keeping each project's execution substrate explicit: operator.config.env, scripts/operator-*.sh, OPERATOR_DIR, feature sessions, lanes, task packets, memory, roadmap, and handoffs stay project-local.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $operator to inspect an installed Agent Operator Kit project, coordinate lanes, create or dispatch task packets, collect handoffs, summarize blockers, or update project-local Operator Kit scripts. When a user initializes sticky Operator mode, treat it as default routing rather than automatic execution: observe, active, dispatch, and off modes still preserve explicit safety gates.
